# Synthetic Planning Transcript

09:00 - Facilitator
Today we need to decide how the intake checklist moves forward.

09:03 - Analyst
What information is missing from the intake checklist?

09:05 - Lead
Proposal: create a lightweight checklist for source intake.

09:09 - Analyst
I support the checklist because it will make handoff evidence clearer.

09:12 - Lead
Decision: use the lightweight checklist for the next intake run.

09:15 - Facilitator
Recap: Lead will prepare the checklist by Friday.
